h9843138bg5b8ag41c8ga024g900e4fc3908b: Have you lost your senses, Kagha? Release her!
hfaa7a354gf484g4d9bg833eg337adbd67f8f: She stole the Idol of Silvanus. She must pay the price.
hc2e93baeg38cag4ab8g8b88g8d410d73365a: We will imprison the thief under guard of my serpent.
h08531cf2gf169g4e64gb787gd7cb6720811a: When we cast out the rest, she may join them.
h709eb740g9006g4db3ga01cgd51862782858: Let the devil be an example: we will tolerate outlanders no longer.
h7d28a7a6g254cg47a3g9556g41d649381a39: The grove will be made safe. The Circle will be closed!
